name: MISRA C: Advisory Violation Recorded
description: Violations of Advisory guidelines are recorded (a formal deviation is not required, but the decision is documented).
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: Advisory guidelines are best practice; departures need not be formal deviations but should be recorded.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C:2012. https://misra.org.uk/
